item.title: Version 0.1.2
item.description:
## CI
- auto-deploy Pages from the release run

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
## Bug Fixes
- move top controls into the window toolbar; add prepare-models tool - make git-cliff tag_pattern accept the bare bumped version
## CI
- Sparkle auto-update + GitHub Actions release/CI/PR workflows
## Features
- scaffold Photo Restore app + RestoreEngine classical stages (U1) - adopt + validate pre-converted Core ML models (U2) - model registry + resumable downloader + compile/cache (U3) - Real-ESRGAN Core ML upscale + tiled seam-blended assembly (U4) - Apple Vision face detection + 512 alignment (U5) - GFPGAN restore + parse-mask paste-back, full RestorePipeline (U6) - serial InferenceEngine + BatchCoordinator + data-safe output policy (U7) - full SwiftUI app — drag-drop, filmstrip, before/after, live preview, settings (U8) - packaging, signing, notarization tooling + docs (U9) - persistent settings inspector, per-result settings, redo + reorderable filmstrip
## Testing
- replace personal photo fixtures with a public-domain portrait

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
## Bug Fixes
- move top controls into the window toolbar; add prepare-models tool - make git-cliff tag_pattern accept the bare bumped version
## CI
- Sparkle auto-update + GitHub Actions release/CI/PR workflows
## Features
- scaffold Photo Restore app + RestoreEngine classical stages (U1) - adopt + validate pre-converted Core ML models (U2) - model registry + resumable downloader + compile/cache (U3) - Real-ESRGAN Core ML upscale + tiled seam-blended assembly (U4) - Apple Vision face detection + 512 alignment (U5) - GFPGAN restore + parse-mask paste-back, full RestorePipeline (U6) - serial InferenceEngine + BatchCoordinator + data-safe output policy (U7) - full SwiftUI app — drag-drop, filmstrip, before/after, live preview, settings (U8) - packaging, signing, notarization tooling + docs (U9) - persistent settings inspector, per-result settings, redo + reorderable filmstrip
## Testing
- replace personal photo fixtures with a public-domain portrait
